en.title: Web Development Services in Munich | Quality & Precision
en.description: Precision-engineered web development in Munich. We deliver high-quality websites and digital products for businesses in Bavaria and beyond.
en.h1: World-Class Web Engineering for Berlin Startups & Enterprises
en.p: AVPdev brings Silicon Valley-grade engineering to Berlin. We build performant Next.js platforms, SaaS MVPs, and smart Telegram bots for the German market.

benefits.title: Elite Web Performance for Munich
benefits.desc: We build Astro and Next.js websites for Munich's engineering and automotive sector, achieving 90+ Lighthouse scores and top search rankings.

benefits.title: Intelligent Automation Bots
benefits.desc: Custom Telegram bots for Munich businesses: lead capture, notifications, and 24/7 customer service on autopilot.

faq.q: What is the cost of web development in Berlin?
faq.a: Pricing starts from €250 for Astro landing pages and €300 for Next.js websites. Custom web applications start from €750.
Astro landing pages take 7–14 days. Full Next.js websites take 2–4 weeks, and complex custom systems take 4–12 weeks.

faq.q: Do you develop Telegram bots and Mini Apps?
faq.a: Yes, we build intelligent bots for business automation. Prices start from €50 depending on the requirements.
Yes, we offer 12 months of technical support after launch, including bug fixes, uptime monitoring, and consultations.

faq.q: What tech stack do you use?
faq.a: We specialize in Next.js, React, Node.js, and Astro. This stack ensures the best performance, scalability, and SEO results.
